title: Waisai Heat Wave
lead: Waisai is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.23. Temperatures are extremely high, causing severe conditions.
body:
The heat wave in Waisai has reached a critical level, with a score of 10.0 out of 10. 
 The high temperatures are causing discomfort and health issues for the local population, with high humidity at 75% and moderate winds at 10.0 km/h. 
 The energy demand is expected to increase due to the high Cooling Degree Days (CDD) of 10.3 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) are at 0.0 GG, indicating no need for heating.
conclusion: Activate emergency measures to mitigate the heat wave effects in Waisai immediately.
